data.title: airSlate SignNow: Cut Paperwork, Sign Faster Today
data.excerpt: Discover how airSlate SignNow simplifies eSignatures and document workflows for teams of any size. Try it free and see why thousands trust it daily.

$media.alt: airSlate SignNow: Cut Paperwork, Sign Faster Today

children.text: *Disclosure: This post contains affiliate links. If you make a purchase through them, TonyCiencia may earn a small commission at no extra cost to you.*

I have signed hundreds of documents digitally over the past few years. Some platforms made the process effortless. Others made me want to print the contract, sign it with a pen, and fax it back like it was 1997. airSlate SignNow falls firmly in the first camp. It is fast, clean, and built for people who refuse to waste time chasing signatures.

In this deep dive, I will walk you through exactly what SignNow is, how it works, what makes it stand out, and whether it fits your workflow. Spoiler: for most teams dealing with contracts, proposals, HR forms, or client approvals, it is a game-changer.
What Is airSlate SignNow?

SignNow is a cloud-based electronic signature and document workflow platform developed by airSlate, a company focused on automating business processes end-to-end. At its core, SignNow lets you send, sign, and manage documents entirely online. No printing. No scanning. No overnight shipping.

But calling it "just an eSignature tool" undersells it. SignNow is part of the broader airSlate ecosystem, which means it plugs into a full automation stack. You can build workflows that trigger after a signature is collected, route documents to the right department, and store everything in one organized hub.

The platform serves everyone from freelancers sending a single contract per week to enterprises processing thousands of agreements daily. It holds a 4.6 rating out of 5 on Capterra from over 539 reviews, which speaks volumes about user satisfaction in a crowded market. If you want a platform that handles the basics flawlessly while giving you room to grow,
check SignNow's latest plans and pricing
How Does SignNow Actually Work?
The workflow is refreshingly straightforward:
Upload your document.
Drag and drop a PDF, Word doc, or start from one of SignNow's templates.
Add signature fields.
Place fields for signatures, initials, dates, checkboxes, and text inputs exactly where they need to go. The drag-and-drop editor makes this painless.
Send it out.
Enter your signer's email address and hit send. They receive a link—no account required on their end.
Track and receive.
You get real-time notifications when the document is opened, viewed, and signed. Once complete, all parties get a copy automatically.

I used this exact flow recently to onboard a freelance contractor. I had a 12-page independent contractor agreement loaded, fields placed, and sent in under four minutes. The contractor signed it from their phone while waiting for coffee. The entire loop—from upload to fully executed contract—took less than 20 minutes. That used to take me three days with email attachments and "can you print, sign, scan, and send back?" follow-ups.
For a step-by-step walkthrough, our
complete guide on how to use airSlate SignNow
breaks down every click.
Key Features That Set SignNow Apart
Plenty of tools let you collect a digital signature. SignNow goes further with features that make document management genuinely frictionless:
Unlimited users on every plan.
This is rare. Most competitors charge per seat, which punishes growing teams. SignNow lets your entire organization use the platform without worrying about escalating costs as headcount grows.
Template library and reusable documents.
Save any document as a template. Customize fields once, reuse forever. Perfect for sales contracts, NDAs, onboarding packets, and recurring vendor agreements.
Bulk sending.
Need to send the same document to 50 or 500 recipients? Bulk send lets you do it in one action. Each recipient gets their own personalized copy with pre-filled fields.
In-person signing.
Hand your tablet to a client and let them sign on the spot using the mobile app. Ideal for field sales, real estate showings, or medical intake forms.
Audit trail and compliance.

Every signature comes with a detailed audit log—timestamps, IP addresses, authentication methods. SignNow complies with ESIGN, UETA, and eIDAS regulations, so your documents hold up legally in the US, EU, and beyond.
Role-based signing and routing.
Assign different roles to different signers. Set signing order so that Person A signs before Person B sees the document. Automate the sequence so nothing gets stuck waiting for a manual trigger.
Cloud storage integrations.
Connect SignNow directly to Google Drive, Dropbox, Box, and OneDrive. Signed documents automatically save to your preferred cloud storage without any manual download-upload dance.
These features are not hidden behind a premium paywall. Even the entry-level Business plan at $10/month (billed annually) includes unlimited users and templates. You can
explore SignNow's features with a free trial
to test everything hands-on before committing.
New and Standout Features Worth Your Attention
airSlate consistently rolls out improvements, and a few recent additions deserve a spotlight:
Conditional fields and smart documents.

You can now add logic to your document fields. If a signer checks "Yes" on a specific checkbox, additional fields appear dynamically. This turns a static PDF into an interactive form that adapts to each signer's responses. Insurance applications, medical questionnaires, and complex onboarding forms benefit enormously from this.
airSlate Flow integration.

Since SignNow sits within the broader airSlate platform, you can chain document workflows together. Imagine a scenario where a signed contract automatically triggers a welcome email, creates a project in your task manager, and notifies your billing team—all without human intervention. That is the power of connecting SignNow to airSlate Flow.
Advanced API and embedded signing.

For developers and SaaS companies, SignNow offers a robust API that lets you embed the signing experience directly into your own application. White-label the experience so your clients never leave your platform. This is a feature that typically costs significantly more with competitors.
Enhanced mobile experience.
The mobile app on both iOS and Android has been redesigned for faster navigation. You can prepare, send, and sign documents from your phone with the same functionality as the desktop version.
We keep an updated list of
SignNow's newest features and updates
as they roll out.
Who Is SignNow Ideal For?
SignNow is not trying to be everything to everyone, and that focus is its strength. Here is who gets the most value out of it:
Small and mid-size businesses
that need professional-grade eSignatures without enterprise-level pricing. The unlimited users model alone makes it a top pick for growing teams where every dollar counts.
Sales teams
that send proposals, quotes, and contracts daily. Pair SignNow with your CRM, and the time savings add up fast. Sending a contract in 60 seconds instead of 60 minutes changes your close rate.
HR departments
handling offer letters, policy acknowledgments, tax forms, and employee agreements. Bulk send and templates turn onboarding from a week-long paper chase into a one-day digital flow.
Legal and compliance teams

that need audit trails, tamper-evident seals, and regulatory compliance baked into every signature. The ESIGN and eIDAS compliance means you do not need a separate legal review of your signing process.
Real estate agents and property managers
who juggle leases, disclosures, and addenda across multiple parties. In-person signing on mobile means you can close deals at the showing, not back at the office.
Freelancers and solopreneurs
who send the occasional contract but still want it to look polished and professional. Even the lowest-tier plan delivers a branded, seamless signing experience.
For more use-case breakdowns, check our article on
SignNow use cases across industries
Pricing That Respects Your Budget
SignNow keeps its pricing transparent and team-friendly:
Business plan:
$10/month (billed annually). Includes unlimited users, unlimited templates, in-person signing, and mobile access. This is the sweet spot for small teams.
Business Premium:
Adds advanced features like bulk sending, signer attachments, and conditional fields.
Enterprise:
Full API access, advanced integrations, custom branding, and dedicated support. Built for organizations with complex document workflows.
airSlate Suite:
The full airSlate platform including document generation, workflow automation, robotic process automation (RPA), and PDF editing alongside SignNow.
Every plan includes a free trial, and you can upgrade or downgrade as your needs change. No long-term contracts. No surprise per-user fees. Head over to
see SignNow's current pricing and get started
to find the right fit.
Our guide on
why you should choose airSlate SignNow
dives deeper into the value proposition at each tier.
How Does SignNow Compare?
The eSignature market has familiar names—DocuSign, Adobe Acrobat Sign, HelloSign (now Dropbox Sign). Here is where SignNow shines brightest against that field:
Price-to-value ratio.
SignNow consistently undercuts competitors on price while matching or exceeding feature sets. Unlimited users on every plan is something most rivals charge a premium for.
Ease of use.
The interface is clean without being simplistic. New users can send their first document in minutes, but power users will find advanced automation and API options that rival enterprise platforms.
airSlate ecosystem advantage.

If you need more than signatures—if you want end-to-end document workflow automation, form building, and business process management—the airSlate suite gives you a single vendor for the entire stack. That eliminates the integration headaches of stitching together five different tools.
Speed.
Documents render fast, the signing experience loads quickly on any device, and the API responds in milliseconds. When you are processing high volumes, performance matters.

The bottom line: SignNow delivers professional, legally binding eSignatures at a fraction of the cost of the biggest names, without sacrificing reliability or features. For practical advice on getting the most out of the platform, read our
SignNow tips and best practices
Why I Recommend SignNow Without Hesitation

After testing dozens of document signing tools, SignNow earns its spot in my recommended stack for one simple reason: it removes friction from the one business process that almost every team, in every industry, deals with—getting documents signed.

The unlimited users model eliminates budget anxiety. The template system saves hours every week. The compliance and audit trail features give legal peace of mind. And the broader airSlate ecosystem means you can scale from simple signing to full workflow automation without switching platforms.
If your team still prints, signs, scans, and emails contracts, you are burning time and money every single day. SignNow fixes that in an afternoon.
Start your free SignNow trial today and see the difference

Frequently Asked Questions
Does SignNow offer a free plan?
SignNow does not have a permanent free tier, but it offers a free trial on all plans. This gives you full access to test features before committing to a paid subscription starting at $10/month.
Is SignNow legally binding?

Yes. SignNow complies with the ESIGN Act (US), UETA (US), and eIDAS (EU) regulations. Every signature includes a detailed audit trail with timestamps, IP addresses, and authentication records, making documents legally enforceable in most jurisdictions worldwide.
Can I use SignNow on my phone?

nAbsolutely. SignNow has native mobile apps for both iOS and Android. You can upload, prepare, send, and sign documents directly from your smartphone or tablet. The in-person signing feature is especially useful for field work where a client can sign on your device.
